isi.lyrics:

Romanization

Don’t mind me

So outrageous

ijen No mercy

Me

singgyeong sseul siganjocha akkawo nan

isi.lyrics:
Lyric BoA - It Takes Two

Romanization

uriui tteugeoun yeoreumeun da
geu jacherodo
haengbokhaesseotji
moraereul machi chimdae samaseo

tto irijeori Na ah ah ah
ganjireophimyeo jangnanchigo
Tell me that you’re mine
Oh mine oh mine
soksagyeotji

And the real and the real world
Like a chill like a chill but
gyejeori kkeutnamyeon What do we do

You know it takes two
Give me something good
uimi eomneun geureon maldeul malgo
nal maeryosikil jinsim geugeoya

You know it takes two
Tell me “Yes, I do” babe
I really really hate it hate it
Do it right for me, you and me,
you and me
It takes two

modu apeseo dangdanghi
urin yaksokhaetji aju
geunsahage We swore together

Acting like everything is true
When I believed in you
Hey baby we are falling down
Oh falling down babe

Ah ah ah ah
dulleodaeji malgo Say ya
Tell me that you’re mine
Oh mine oh mine
soksagyeotji

And the real and the real world
Like a chill like a chill but
gyejeori kkeutnamyeon What do we do

You know it takes two
Give me something good
uimi eomneun geureon maldeul malgo
nal maeryosikil jinsim geugeoya

You know it takes two
Tell me “Yes, I do” babe
I really really hate it hate it
Do it right for me, you and me,
you and me
It takes two

It takes two do
what we want to
Yeah it takes two yeah
One, neoui jangnanseureoun
eoreun dapji mothan haengdong da ara
Two, kkwaena yonggamhaetjiman
buranjeonghan uri dul

You know it takes two
Give me something good
uimi eomneun geureon maldeul malgo
nal maeryosikil jinsim geugeoya

You know it takes two
Tell me “Yes, I do” babe
I really really hate it hate it
Do it right for me, you and me,
you and me
It takes two

It takes two to light a fire
I don't need no liar liar
Heart is blazing burning higher
No more talkin', come on babe

It takes two to light a fire
I don't need no liar liar
Heart is blazing burning higher
(Can't stop loving babe)

Hangeul

우리의 뜨거운 여름은 다
그 자체로도
행복했었지
모래를 마치 침대 삼아서

또 이리저리 Na ah ah ah
간지럽히며 장난치고
Tell me that you’re mine
Oh mine oh mine
속삭였지

And the real and the real world
Like a chill like a chill but
계절이 끝나면 What do we do

You know it takes two
Give me something good
의미 없는 그런 말들 말고
날 매료시킬 진심 그거야

You know it takes two
Tell me “Yes, I do” babe
I really really hate it hate it
Do it right for me, you and me,
you and me
It takes two

모두 앞에서 당당히
우린 약속했지 아주
근사하게 We swore together

Acting like everything is true
When I believed in you
Hey baby we are falling down
Oh falling down babe

Ah ah ah ah
둘러대지 말고 Say ya
Tell me that you’re mine
Oh mine oh mine
속삭였지

And the real and the real world
Like a chill like a chill but
계절이 끝나면 What do we do

You know it takes two
Give me something good
의미 없는 그런 말들 말고
날 매료시킬 진심 그거야

You know it takes two
Tell me “Yes, I do” babe
I really really hate it hate it
Do it right for me, you and me,
you and me
It takes two

It takes two do
what we want to
Yeah it takes two yeah
One, 너의 장난스러운
어른 답지 못한 행동 다 알아
Two, 꽤나 용감했지만
불안정한 우리 둘

You know it takes two
Give me something good
의미 없는 그런 말들 말고
날 매료시킬 진심 그거야

You know it takes two
Tell me “Yes, I do” babe
I really really hate it hate it
Do it right for me, you and me,
you and me
It takes two

It takes two to light a fire
I don't need no liar liar
Heart is blazing burning higher
No more talkin', come on babe

It takes two to light a fire
I don't need no liar liar
Heart is blazing burning higher
(Can't stop loving babe)

isi.lyrics:
Lyric BoA - Healing Generation

Romanization

We are the healing generation

saerowojin Moment
Feel the rhythm
‘Cause I like it
saekdareun bunwigi sok
gadeuk gitdeun
natseon gibun Oh yeah oh

galjeungmajeo neukkiji
And I’m drown, drowning
dasi chajeun deuthan Dream
keojin Fantasy
nan sori nopyeo oechyeo
What can we do
algo sipeo All things oh

neul buranhaetdeon nareul butjaba
ttabunhaetdeon mameul kkaeun daeum
soneul ppeodeo Save me deeper
down, down, down

We’re the healing generation
We’re gonna change
your point of view
hwimorachin This emotion
gipi ppajyeodeureoga
ppittureojin gamjeongdeuri
Actin’ crazy
jejarineun eomneun geoya
So amazing
Healing generation
I’m gonna change it
all for you

ijen geuman jiwo History
da jinagan ildeureun Legacy
paneul dwijibeo bakkwo
nae ane ullineun Tragedy
deo geochilge ttwineun simjang
kkeutkkaji chaneun sum
soneul kkok jaba You and me

Strong together
Through every storm
We’ll make it better
i sunggane urireul matgyeo

neul bimilseureoun naege dagawa
pureonaegon mameul ppaeseoga
sunsikgane Dive in deeper
down, down, down

We’re the healing generation
We’re gonna change
your point of view
hwimorachin This emotion
gipi ppajyeodeureoga
ppittureojin gamjeongdeuri Actin’ crazy
jejarineun eomneun geoya So amazing
Healing generation
I’m gonna change it
all for you

We can heal the world
Just believe it
Heal the world if we dream it
saerowo Can’t believe it
Heal the world if we dream it
(natseon gamgak neomeo Ooh)

We’re the healing generation
We’re gonna change
your point of view
dallajineun onggireul neukkyeo
nareul kkeureoaneun pum

We’re the healing generation
We’re gonna change
your point of view
memallajin mameul jeoksyeo
dasi pieonaneun sum (dasi pieona)

Hangeul

We are the healing generation

새로워진 Moment
Feel the rhythm
‘Cause I like it
색다른 분위기 속
가득 깃든
낯선 기분 Oh yeah oh

갈증마저 느끼지
And I’m drown, drowning
다시 찾은 듯한 Dream
커진 Fantasy
난 소리 높여 외쳐
What can we do
알고 싶어 All things oh

늘 불안했던 나를 붙잡아
따분했던 맘을 깨운 다음
손을 뻗어 Save me deeper
down, down, down

We’re the healing generation
We’re gonna change
your point of view
휘몰아친 This emotion
깊이 빠져들어가
삐뚤어진 감정들이
Actin’ crazy
제자리는 없는 거야
So amazing
Healing generation
I’m gonna change it
all for you

이젠 그만 지워 History
다 지나간 일들은 Legacy
판을 뒤집어 바꿔
내 안에 울리는 Tragedy
더 거칠게 뛰는 심장
끝까지 차는 숨
손을 꼭 잡아 You and me

Strong together
Through every storm
We’ll make it better
이 순간에 우리를 맡겨

늘 비밀스러운 내게 다가와
풀어내곤 맘을 뺏어가

neoreul ttaraganda mideosseo

gakkawotdeon bicheun eoneusae meoreojigo
saeroun gose inneun nareul balgyeonhaesseo
uisimhae bon jeok eopdeon naui mideumdeuri
eoneusae nareul noryeobomyeo
naege chaegimeul mureo

“o, ireon maeumi wae sseurin geolkka” oechineun
nan imi dabeul algo itgie
meon i yeohaenggireul jinawatda handeul
gyeolguk dasi jejarie meomulleo
jasinege geojiseul malhago isseo

gakkawotdeon gireun eodugeodukhaejigo
apeul bakhideon bicheun dasi meoreojyeo ga
olda yeogimyeon eoneusae meoreojyeo inneun
jeo bicheun neowa kkok dalmaisseo
i gireun nawa kkok dalmaisseo

“o, ireon maeumi wae sseurin geolkka” oechineun
nan imi dabeul algo itgie
meon i yeohaenggireul jinawatda handeul
gyeolguk dasi jejarie meomulleo
jasinege geojiseul malhago isseo

“o, ireon maeumi wae sseurin geolkka” oechineun
nan imi dabeul algo itgie
meon i yeohaenggireul jinawatda handeul
gyeolguk dasi jejarie meomulleo
naega byeonhagil barago isseo

geopdo mani meogeotdeon nayeotgie
jeo ape mueosi jonjaehaneunji almyeonseodo
neoui ttaseuhan mal hammadimaneul bomyeo
hayeomeopsi noreul jeotgo inneun geol

“modeun geon olge byeonhaeyaman hae” oechideon
nan imi nareul algo itgie
meon i yeohaenggireul jinawatdeon
nareul tathago inneunjido moreugesseo
huhoehaljido moreugesseo

“naege olbareun gireul bichwo jwo”
gireul bichwojundago mideotdeon
geugose dadareugo naege boin geon
musuhan deungdaeppunieosseo

Hangeul

가까웠던 길은 어둑어둑해지고
새로운 빛은 다른 곳을 가리켜 줘
의심해 본 적 없던 나의 작은 빛이
오늘따라 낯설게 보여
너를 따라간다 믿었어

가까웠던 빛은 어느새 멀어지고
새로운 곳에 있는 나를 발견했어
의심해 본 적 없던 나의 믿음들이
어느새 나를 노려보며
나에게 책임을 물어

“오, 이런 마음이 왜 쓰린 걸까” 외치는
난 이미 답을 알고 있기에
먼 이 여행길을 지나왔다 한들
결국 다시 제자리에 머물러
자신에게 거짓을 말하고 있어

가까웠던 길은 어둑어둑해지고
앞을 밝히던 빛은 다시 멀어져 가
옳다 여기면 어느새 멀어져 있는
저 빛은 너와 꼭 닮아있어
이 길은 나와 꼭 닮아있어

“오, 이런 마음이 왜 쓰린 걸까” 외치는
난 이미 답을 알고 있기에
먼 이 여행길을 지나왔다 한들
결국 다시 제자리에 머물러
자신에게 거짓을 말하고 있어

“오, 이런 마음이 왜 쓰린 걸까” 외치는
난 이미 답을 알고 있기에
먼 이 여행길을 지나왔다 한들
결국 다시 제자리에 머물러
내가 변하길 바라고 있어

겁도 많이 먹었던 나였기에
저 앞에 무엇이 존재하는지 알면서도
너의 따스한 말 한마디만을 보며
하염없이 노를 젓고 있는 걸

“모든 건 옳게 변해야만 해” 외치던
난 이미 나를 알고 있기에
먼 이 여행길을 지나왔던
나를 탓하고 있는지도 모르겠어
후회할지도 모르겠어

“내게 올바른 길을 비춰 줘”
길을 비춰준다고 믿었던
그곳에 다다르고 내게 보인 건
무수한 등대뿐이었어
